channel.title: Canon EMEA — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Canon EMEA (canon_emea).

item.title: CVE-2026-1433 · 4.8 MEDIUM — uniFLOW Universal Login Manager (ULM) Standalone Improper Protection of Sensitive Information Leads to Information Disclosure
item.description: uniFLOW Universal Login Manager (ULM) Standalone contains an information disclosure vulnerability that may allow an authenticated administrator to access sensitive configuration information through the ULM Remote User Interface (RUI). Exploitation re…

item.title: CVE-2025-11843 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Therefore™ Online and Therefore™ On-Premises contains an account impersonation issue, which could potentially allow the attacker to access all the stored data
item.description: Therefore Corporation GmbH has recently become aware that Therefore™ Online and Therefore™ On-Premises contain an account impersonation vulnerability. A malicious user may potentially be able to impersonate the web service account or the account of a…

item.title: CVE-2025-5995 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Canon EOS Webcam Utility Pro for MAC OS contains an insecure permission issue potentially leading to code execution and privilege escalation
item.description: Canon EOS Webcam Utility Pro for MAC OS version 2.3d (2.3.29) and earlier contains an improper directory permissions vulnerability. Exploitation of this vulnerability requires administrator access by a malicious user. An attacker could modify the dir…

item.title: CVE-2024-1578 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Multiple MiCard PLUS card reader dropped characters
item.description: The MiCard PLUS Ci and MiCard PLUS BLE reader products developed by rf IDEAS and rebranded by NT-ware have a firmware fault that may result in characters randomly being dropped from some ID card reads, which would result in the wrong ID card number b…

item.title: CVE-2024-1621 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — uniFLOW Online device registration susceptible to compromise
item.description: The registration process of uniFLOW Online (NT-ware product) apps, prior to and including version 2024.1.0, can be compromised when email login is enabled on the tenant. Those tenants utilising email login in combination with Microsoft Safe Links or…
